prompt: Product flat lay photography on dark slate stone surface. Disassembled Dubery Rasta Red sunglasses -- the frame, two red-orange mirror lenses, and two temples with gold and rasta stripe accents are all separated and laid out individually on the dark slate, showing each component piece clearly. The black box, drawstring pouch with red cord, grey microfiber cloth, and blue polarization test card are also arranged around the separated pieces. Dark charcoal slate texture with subtle grey veining. Same studio lighting and environment as the reference image. 16:9 landscape aspect ratio, high resolution product photography.
